title: tater - span annotation
description: Tag named entities in pet-related text using the span annotation and span popup widgets.
instructions:
This example demonstrates two span annotation styles using the same entity types.

**Span Annotation - Sidebar**:

1. Click the widget in the sidebar to activate it
2. Highlight text in the document
3. Click an entity type button to label it

**Span Annotation - Popup**:

1. Click the widget in the sidebar to activate it
2. Highlight text in the document
3. Click an entity type in the popup that appears near the selection

Entity types:

- `Pet` - animal name or subject
- `Breed` - species or breed
- `Behavior` - actions or states
- `Activity` - what the pet is doing

widget.label: Pet Entities - Sidebar
widget.description: Highlight text then click an entity type to label it.

widget.label: Pet Entities - Popup
widget.description: Highlight text — a popup appears near the selection to choose the entity type.
